error_message: BigQuery error: partition 2026-06-12 not found in raw.customer_transactions
root_cause: The upstream raw.customer_transactions partition was delayed and was not available when the DAG started.
accepted_fix: Backfill the missing raw.customer_transactions partition and rerun the DAG from transform_revenue.
rejected_fixes: Increasing retries without checking whether the upstream partition exists
prevention: Add an upstream partition sensor before transform_revenue.

error_message: Row count mismatch: source count 120034, target count 119981
normalized_error: row count mismatch between source and target
root_cause: Late-arriving source records landed after the initial transformation completed.
accepted_fix: Wait for source completion marker and rerun validation after upstream load completes.
rejected_fixes: Ignoring the mismatch because the difference looked small
prevention: Use a completion marker sensor and compare counts after source load finalization.

error_message: Column payout_status expected STRING but received INT64
normalized_error: column type changed in source file
root_cause: Source system changed payout_status type without notifying downstream consumers.
accepted_fix: Update schema mapping and add a contract validation check before loading.
rejected_fixes: Casting all columns to STRING without preserving business types
prevention: Add schema contract checks and alert the source owner before processing.

error_message: Source table raw.customer_transactions was not updated within SLA window
root_cause: Upstream CDC job finished 48 minutes later than expected.
accepted_fix: Wait for CDC completion and rerun extract_transactions.
prevention: Add source freshness sensor and route alert to upstream owner.

error_message: Duplicate key detected for settlement_id and processing_date
root_cause: Upstream file was replayed twice due to retry behavior.
accepted_fix: Deduplicate by settlement_id, processing_date, and source_file_sequence.
rejected_fixes: Dropping all duplicate records without sequence-based tie-breaker
prevention: Add idempotency check using source file manifest.

error_message: Required field email_address null rate increased from 0.2% to 36%
normalized_error: null value spike in required field
root_cause: A source mapping change stopped populating email_address.
accepted_fix: Rollback source mapping and rerun profile load.
rejected_fixes: Relaxing the null threshold without source owner approval
prevention: Add field-level anomaly alert and source contract check.

error_message: API request timed out after 300 seconds
root_cause: External API latency increased during provider maintenance.
accepted_fix: Retry after provider maintenance window and add exponential backoff.
rejected_fixes: Reducing payload size without confirming provider status
prevention: Add provider status check and exponential backoff.

root_cause: SFTP key rotation reminder was missed.
accepted_fix: Rotate key, update secret, and rerun from connect_to_bank_sftp.
prevention: Add credential expiration monitoring and 14-day rotation alert.
